Journal.Title: American heart journal plus : cardiology research and practice

Article.ArticleTitle: Is predictive modeling the missing link for post-STEMI recovery in rural and resource-poor regions?

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Doctor in Religious and Values Education, De la Salle University Malate, National Capital Region (NCR), Philippines.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The authors declare that they have no known competing financial interests or personal relationships that could have appeared to influence the work reported in this paper.
